properties.remark: ASOS AT LANDER HUNT FIELD REGISTERED A 62 MPH WIND GUST.
AUTOMATED SENSOR AT NWS RIVERTON REGISTERED 59 MPH WIND GUST.
3.97 INCHES OF RAIN AT LND AIRPORT FOR THIS EVENT. SEVERAL ROADS HAVE HIGH RUNNING WATER. ONE KNOWN WASHOUT OCCURRED ON THE OLD WIND RIVER HIGHWAY JUST SOUTH OF FORT WASKAKIE.
A PICTURE OF HAIL UP TO THE SIZE OF TENNIS BALLS WAS POSTED ON FACEBOOK.
A TRAINED SPOTTER REPORTED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL.
A TRAINED SPOTTER REPORTED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL.
ACCUMULATING ON THE GROUND AND TAKE LEAVES OFF OF TREES
AROUND A 6-INCH DIAMETER TREE BLEW DOWN.
LARGE TREE BLOWN OVER, NUMEROUS SMALL BRANCHES. TWO POWER POLES SNAPPED 3-4 FT OFF THE GROUND ON STATE ROUTE 170, 1 MILE WEST OF INTERCHANGE WITH HWY 120.
AT THERMPOLIS FIRE STATION. ID C8386.
